name: Prosciutto Di Parma with Baked Stuffed Figs
recipeIngredient: 12 figs, cut open at the top but left whole at the base
6 ounces Gorgonzola cheese, at room temperature
8 ounces Prosciutto di Parma, sliced paper thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F.
2. Place figs on a non-greased baking sheet, opening them with fingers as best you can.
3. In a mixing bowl, stir together Gorgonzola cheese, chopped walnuts, and chopped parsley until well mixed.
4. Using a tablespoon, stuff each fig with about 1 tablespoon of the filling.
5. Bake figs for 8 to 10 minutes, until the cheese filling is bubbling out.
6. Meanwhile, lay 3 or 4 slices of Prosciutto on each of 4 plates.
7. Remove figs from the oven and place 3 in the center of each plate.
8. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
